title: Creating a new market of traders
author: ResourceSuch5589
selftext:
My team and I built **Nvestiq**.

We’re not building one magic model. We built a whole platform so people can actually create and test their own, all without touching code. If you’ve got an idea, whether it’s some ML quant model or just "buy when the candle looks strong," you can set it up and see if it holds up.

The platform handles all the boring stuff automatically (cleaning data, feature extraction, making sure orders actually fill the way they should). Right now we’re running millisecond-per-bar latency and can handle hundreds of symbols in parallel. Backtest to live is seamless - no rewriting anything.

The [free beta](https://nvestiq.com/) should run a month or two, then a paid beta for a few months after that. Full launch will let people deploy and even monetize their own strategies in different trading languages.

We just want experienced (or even reckless) traders to push it to its limits and see what breaks.
